query:
SELECT `id`,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(`metadata`, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) AS sync_status,
  CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(`metadata`, '$.ePhotoPendingUploads.front.dataUrl') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE CHAR_LENGTH(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(`metadata`, '$.ePhotoPendingUploads.front.dataUrl'))) END AS front_dataurl_len,
  CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(`metadata`, '$.ePhotoPendingUploads.back.dataUrl') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE CHAR_LENGTH(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(`metadata`, '$.ePhotoPendingUploads.back.dataUrl'))) END AS back_dataurl_len,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(`metadata`, '$.ePhotoPendingUploads.front.fileName')) AS front_file_name,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(`metadata`, '$.ePhotoPendingUploads.back.fileName')) AS back_file_name,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(`metadata`, '$.eFrontPhotoUrl')) AS front_url,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(`metadata`, '$.eBackPhotoUrl')) AS back_url
FROM `station_tasks`
WHERE `id` = 510875;

  CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(`metadata`, '$.ePhotoPendingUploads.back.dataUrl') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE CHAR_LENGTH(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(`metadata`, '$.ePhotoPendingUploads.back.dataUrl'))) END AS back_dataurl_len,
